title: Tactics Trainer
description: Sharpen your tactical vision on 140 hand-filtered puzzles from the Lichess open puzzle database (CC0 / public domain). Organized by motif — forks, pins, skewers, discovered attacks, sacrifices, and mating patterns — and ordered from beginner to expert.

chapters.title: Tactical Motifs

lessons.title: Forks
lessons.description: One piece attacks two targets at once. Find the fork that wins material. 14 curated Lichess puzzles, easy to hard.

steps.title: Forks

lessons.title: Back-Rank Mates
lessons.description: Trap the king on its back rank behind its own pawns. 14 curated Lichess puzzles, easy to hard.

steps.title: Back-Rank Mates
steps.body:
Trap the king on its back rank behind its own pawns.

Each puzzle below is a real position from the **Lichess** open puzzle database, ordered from easier to harder. The opponent has just moved — find the solution. Use the **← Black/White played** toggle to review the setup move, and **🔍 Analyze** to explore lines before committing.

steps.question: Black to move. Find the forced checkmate.

preMovePosition.annotation: The opponent just played Qc6. Now it's your turn — deliver the back-rank mate.

steps.successMessage: Solved in 3 moves — 1. Qxf2+ Kh1 2. Qf1+ Rxf1 3. Rxf1#!
